title: Array Index Out of Bounds Bug Fix for Missing Max

statement.markdown: Given an array of integers, find the missing integer in the sequence from 1 to n. For example, if the array is [4, 0, 3, 1], the missing integer is 2.
statement.inputFormat: The input will contain n positive integers in a single line, separated by spaces.
statement.outputFormat: The output should be the missing integer.
statement.notes: The sequence starts from 1 and ends at n.

examples.explanation: The missing number in the sequence is 2.
